values.content:
=You are a helpful, intelligent resume writing assistant that drafts high converting resumed based on jobs.

This resume will be added to a Google doc, so write in HTML format that I can easily copy/paste. Do not output any backticks (no ```). Your first charachters should be <html>

#Overview
I'm looking for jobs. Your task is to customise provided resume using a provided job description

##Job description
{{ $('Get dataset items').item.json.descriptionText }}

--

##My Resume:
{{ $('Get My Resume').item.json.content }}


respond with only  the customised, updated resume-nothing else.
Remember, this resume will be added to a Google doc, so write in HTML format that I can easily copy/paste.

parameters.content: # Scrape jobs from linkedIn using Apify.
# Create a tailored resume for each job and add them to a Google Sheet.

json.title: AI Quality Assurance Intern
json.descriptionHtml:
Votre Mission Chez Cegedim

Join us in ensuring the quality, reliability, and trustworthiness of next-generation AI-powered solutions.

At Cegedim Academy, we’re looking for passionate AI Quality Assurance Interns to work alongside experienced mentors and talented peers on real-world AI projects. As part of the internship, you’ll contribute to validating AI-powered features and cloud applications, ensuring they meet quality, performance, and business requirements before reaching users.

This is a hybrid, fast-paced environment where innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning are encouraged. You’ll gain hands-on experience testing both traditional software and modern AI systems while making meaningful contributions to production-oriented solutions.

What You’ll Do

  • Design and execute test cases for web, cloud, and AI-powered applications
  • Validate AI-generated outputs for accuracy, consistency, and business relevance
  • Perform functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing
  • Test Large Language Model (LLM) features, prompts, and AI workflows
  • Identify, document, and track software defects and AI quality issues
  • Collaborate with AI Engineers, Software Engineers, and Product Owners throughout the project lifecycle
  • Participate in evaluating AI system performance using defined quality metrics
  • Learn industry best practices for software testing, AI validation, and quality assurance

What We’re Looking For

Currently pursuing or recently completed (2025 or 2026) a degree in:

  • Computer Science
  • Computer Engineering
  • Artificial Intelligence
  • Information Systems
  • Software Engineering

Technical Skills

  • Basic understanding of software testing principles and quality assurance processes
  • Familiarity with web applications, APIs, and databases
  • Basic programming knowledge in Python or another programming language
  • Interest in Artificial Intelligence and Generative AI technologies
  • Familiarity with testing tools, Postman, Selenium, or automation concepts is a plus
  • Understanding of LLMs, prompt engineering, or AI evaluation concepts is a plus

Soft Skills

  • Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail
  • Strong teamwork, communication, and problem-solving skills
  • Curiosity, initiative, and a willingness to learn
  • Ability to evaluate results critically and identify edge cases

Why Join Us?

  • Work on real AI and software quality challenges with business impact
  • Receive mentorship from experienced professionals
  • Gain practical experience with modern testing and AI validation techniques
  • Collaborate in a supportive and innovative environment
  • Build skills that prepare you for a career in Quality Engineering, Software Testing, or AI Quality Assurance

Founded in 1969, Cegedim is an innovative technology and services company in the field of digital data flow management for healthcare ecosystems and B2B, and a business software publisher for healthcare and insurance professionals. Cegedim employs 6,500 people in more than 10 countries and generated revenue of €649.2 million in 2025. Cegedim SA is listed in Paris (EURONEXT: CGM).

json.title: Integration Engineer, GISACC
json.descriptionHtml:
Mission

As part of a highly dynamic team, the candidate will be responsible for developing solutions and coordinating the integration across an enterprise or different system components to ensure that final solutions meet the identified business needs.

In addition, candidates in this role should be able to support different integration applications and reuse existing solutions when possible to deliver a realized business value.

Responsibilities

  • Develop, maintain, and support software applications using TIBCO BusinessWorks based on product backlog features and business priorities
  • Understand and analyze business requirements to identify any gaps or missing specifications/prerequisites needed to perform development and testing activities based on TIBCO BusinessWorks solution
  • Participate in adding product backlog items for business review
  • Resolve defects and perform application maintenance activities
  • Deliver and integrate output on configuration management tools
  • Support TIBCO applications deployment and monitoring on different environments
  • Perform technical reviews on software design and coding
  • Follow standard team processes and guidelines and ensure process conformance
  • Contribute effectively in the continuous improvement of his/her project, team, and work environment by submitting improvement proposals whenever possible
  • Interact and work collaboratively with cross-functional teams
  • Provide needed support for his/her colleagues
  • Raise flags proactively for any issue that can impact his/her project or team
  • Candidate Profile

Education

  • B.Sc. in Computer Engineering, Communication, or Electronics
  • B.Sc. in Computer Science
  • 0 – 3 Years of experience
  • Competencies Framework (Professional/Transversal)

Professional Competencies

Behavioral Competencies

  • knowledge of SOA concepts and experience with web services, integration and Enterprise Service Bus technologies
  • Hands-on experience in API Interfaces, SOAP, REST, JSON, XML
  • Hands-on Experience in SQL and relational Database concepts
  • Good experience with Java
  • Good knowledge in Agile Scrum
  • Excellent Troubleshooting and debugging skills
  • Strong understanding of business processes, workflow, and use cases
  • Support production operation monitoring and incident management
  • Experience with configuration management tools (Git)
  • Excellent problem-solving skills
  • Excellent Team spirit and communication abilities
  • Excellent time management skills
  • High sense of ownership and commitment
  • Good attention to details
  • Good analytical and decision making skills
  • Proactivity
  • Job Communication / Relationship

Internal Communication

External Communication

  • Report work progress continuously through attendance of Daily Scrum meetings
  • Participate in meetings/calls with internal stakeholders
  • Participate in all standard Agile Scrum ceremonies
  • Excellent command of English Language is a must
  • Customer communication to provide feedback or perform service support
  • Effective listening to truly understand and report a customer’s issue
  • Good presentation skills to demonstrate technical information/limitation to external stakeholders/ non-experts
  • French Language Communication is a plus

json.companyDescription:
Valeo is a technology company and partner to all automakers and new mobility players worldwide. Valeo innovates to make mobility safer, smarter and more sustainable. Valeo enjoys technological and industrial leadership in electrification, driving assistance systems, reinvention of the interior experience and lighting everywhere. These four areas, vital to the transformation of mobility, are the Group's growth drivers.

Valeo in figures: 21.5 billion euros in sales in 2024 | 106,100 employees, 28 countries, 155 plants, 64 research and development centers and 19 distribution platforms at February 28, 2025. Valeo is listed on the Paris Stock Exchange

--

Valeo, entreprise technologique, partenaire de tous les constructeurs automobiles et des nouveaux acteurs de la mobilité, œuvre pour une mobilité plus propre, plus sûre et plus intelligente, grâce à ses innovations. Valeo dispose d’un leadership technologique et industriel dans l’électrification, les aides à la conduite, la réinvention de la vie à bord et l'éclairage à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur du véhicule. Ces quatre domaines, essentiels à la transformation de la mobilité, sont les vecteurs de croissance du Groupe.

Valeo en chiffres: 21.5 milliards d'euros de chiffre d'affaires en 2024 | 106 100 employés, 28 pays, 155 sites de production, 64 centres de recherche et développement et 19 plateformes de distribution au 28 février 2025. Valeo est cotée à la Bourse de Paris.

json.title: Audio Quality Reviewer
json.descriptionHtml:
Audio Quality Reviewer (AI Training)

About The Role

What if your ears could help shape the future of artificial intelligence? We're looking for Audio Quality Reviewers to evaluate audio recordings that power cutting-edge AI systems. Your feedback will directly influence how AI hears, understands, and processes sound — making a real and lasting impact on the technology millions of people use every day.

This is a fully remote, flexible contract role open to anyone with a keen ear and a sharp eye for detail. No audio engineering degree required.

  • Organization: Alignerr
  • Type: Hourly Contract
  • Location: Remote
  • Commitment: 10–40 hours/week

What You'll Do

  • Listen to audio recordings and evaluate them for clarity, accuracy, and overall technical quality
  • Identify issues such as background noise, mispronunciations, distortion, or inconsistencies
  • Verify that transcriptions accurately match spoken audio content
  • Provide structured, detailed feedback on each recording using clear rating guidelines
  • Work through batches of audio independently and at your own pace

Who You Are

  • A strong, attentive listener with the ability to detect subtle audio differences
  • Detail-oriented with consistent, reliable judgment across large volumes of content
  • Comfortable working independently with audio playback tools and online platforms
  • Equipped with a pair of headphones or earbuds for accurate listening
  • Self-motivated and able to manage your own schedule
  • No prior audio engineering or AI experience required

Nice to Have

  • Background in music, broadcasting, linguistics, or transcription
  • Familiarity with audio production or quality assurance workflows
  • Experience providing structured feedback or working in evaluation-based roles

Why Join Us

  • Work on real AI projects alongside leading research labs and top AI organizations
  • Fully remote and flexible — set your own hours and work from anywhere
  • Freelance autonomy with meaningful, task-based work that keeps things varied
  • Contribute to AI audio technology that has a tangible impact on how machines understand the world
  • Potential for ongoing work and contract extension as new projects launch

json.title: Test Engineer (m/w/d)
json.descriptionHtml:
Standort

Cairo, EG

Stellen-ID: 5386

Join the energy revolution with #teamsonnen!

At sonnen, we’re driven by a clear goal: creating a future powered by clean, affordable energy for everyone. That’s why we make our customers independent – not only from fossil fuels, but also from rising electricity costs.

The key to this independence is our intelligent, all-in-one energy system. It combines solar panels, battery storage, energy tariffs, and wallboxes – all developed and manufactured in Germany.

As the first and only provider in Germany, we also connect thousands of home batteries into one shared network: the sonnenVPP, our industry-leading virtual power plant.

In short: every day, we’re working to shape the energy future. And we’d be thrilled to have you join us!

The “DSC” (Device and Site Control) team develops the control unit of each sonnenBatterie. The most important tasks are conception, planning, development and maintenance of the software. The team works according to the agile methods of the SCRUM framework. A team consists of architects, software developers and software testers located in Málaga (Spain) and Wildpoldsried (Germany).

As part of the “DSC Testing” team, you will create new test cases for testing the correct behaviour of our sonnenBatteries as well as designing, implementing and updating the testing repository of our sonnenBatteries. In the testing team we also take care of the test automation framework, the documentation and the good state of our systems with new software versions on residential and industrial battery systems.

What You Will Do To Help Drive Energy Transition

  • Developing the test specification, test procedures and test tools for the automated tests of the sonnenBatterie in python.
  • Support and further development of the test hardware for automated software tests.
  • Direct collaboration with the software developers in the SCRUM team.
  • Creation of the test specification, execution of the manual and automated tests as well as reporting.

What You’ll Bring

  • Successfully completed studies in the field of electronics, computer science or with comparable experience.
  • You strive for a high degree of automation.
  • Experience in Python development and/or test automation is desirable.
  • Experience with inverters or battery systems
  • Ability to work in a team, strong communication skills as well as a goal and solution-oriented way of thinking and working.
  • Written and spoken fluency in English.

Stellensegment: Testing, Computer Science, Technology

companyAddress.streetAddress: Plot 185, Second District, Fifth Settlement; New Cairo

json.companyDescription:
At sonnen, we are building the energy system of the future. An energy system in which electricity is clean and people are the focus. To this end, we are developing new technologies and business models that have not existed before. Whether intelligent power storage, virtual power plants or digital services - we set the trends of a new energy world. This creates space for innovation, creativity, passion and personal development opportunities in a rapidly growing company.

Our drive is our vision of clean and affordable energy for everyone. Because we want our planet to remain livable for the next generation. 

sonnen is expanding its diverse and international team. Our goal is to grow our hardware, software, and digital capabilities to meet the increasing global demand for our products. As part of this expansion, we decided to establish an R&D hub in Cairo, a bustling and tech-savvy metropolis. We are confident that by entering the Egyptian market, Cairo will fuel our innovation with highly skilled and diverse talent, and its vibrant energy. 

If you want to change and redesign the energy system together with us, we look forward to receiving your application through our career site: https://sonnen.eg/careers/

json.title: System Design engineer - AI & Tooling, LIGHT
json.descriptionHtml:
Valeo est une entreprise mondiale de haute technologie qui conçoit des solutions révolutionnaires pour réinventer la mobilité. Nous sommes un équipementier partenaire des constructeurs automobiles et des acteurs de la nouvelle mobilité dans le monde entier. Notre vision ? Inventer une mobilité plus verte et plus sûre, grâce à des solutions axées sur la conduite intuitive et la réduction des émissions de CO2. Nous sommes leaders dans nos domaines d'activité et reconnus comme l'une des plus grandes entreprises innovantes au monde.

ResponsibilitiesAI-Driven Requirement Extraction

  • Manage and Do the requirement extraction service for the System and Product Architects Network utilizing the company AI tools. This role demands delivering high-accuracy results with rapid turnaround times to support architectural decision-making.

AI & Intelligent Automation

  • Leverage AI technologies (e.g., AI agents, NLP, automation assistants) to support~
  • Requirement extraction and analysis
  • Compliance and traceability support
  • Engineering data processing and reporting
  • Propose and implement AI-based solutions to improve productivity and reduce manual effort.
  • Collaborate with system engineers to ensure AI solutions align with engineering standards and quality requirements.

Tooling & Scripting Development

  • Design, develop, and maintain automation tools according to the defined roadmap.
  • Document high-level requirements and technical specifications for developed tools.
  • Develop scripts and applications to automate repetitive engineering activities (e.g., requirement handling, traceability, reports, metrics).
  • Ensure maintainability by documenting tool architecture, design decisions, and usage guidelines.

Toolchain & ALM Support

  • Define and support the required toolchain for System Engineering activities.
  • Work with Requirement Management and ALM tools (e.g., Codebeamer, DOORS, Core ALM).
  • Support integrations between tools and data sources when needed.

Key competenciesTechnical Skills

Programming & Scripting~

  • Python
  • Javascript / Google Apps Script
  • Google Docs / Sheets functions & automation
  • HTTP rest API's

Tooling & ALM~ ( Plus Knowledge)

  • Codebeamer (Requirement Management Tool)
  • Google Cloud Platform

Automation & Integration concepts

  • AI & Data Handling~
  • Basic to intermediate experience with AI tools, APIs, or AI agents
  • Interest in applying AI to engineering processes

Soft Skills

  • Strong communication and collaboration skills
  • Ability to work autonomously and proactively
  • Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving skills
  • User-oriented mindset (training, support, feedback handling)
  • Time Managment

Nice to Have

Experience with requirement traceability or compliance activities

Exposure to AI-assisted automation or low-code/no-code platforms

Understanding of system engineering lifecycle and deliverables

Aware About Automotive Industry And Embedded Systems.

Years of Experience0 to 2 years experience in tools development

Position~

AI4all, Engineering Disciplines

Département~

GTSC Software

Schedule~

Temps plein

Employee Status~

CDI

Type de contrat~

Job Posting Date~

2026-03-03

Join Us !

Being part of our team, you will join~

  • one of the largest global innovative companies, with more than 20,000 engineers working in Research & Development
  • a multi-cultural environment that values diversity and international collaboration
  • more than 100,000 colleagues in 31 countries... which make a lot of opportunity for career growth
  • a business highly committed to limiting the environmental impact if its activities and ranked by Corporate Knights as the number one company in the automotive sector in terms of sustainable development

More information on Valeo~ https~//www.valeo.com

json.title: Summer Internship | Software Backend Engineer
json.descriptionHtml:
Dsquares is more than just a loyalty program provider; our expertise lies in crafting loyalty solutions to give an unforgettable experiences that keep customers coming back for more. From concept to execution, we handle the entire loyalty journey, turning brands into beloved obsessions.

With our tech-savvy team and a passion for innovation, we're not just building programs; we empower businesses to build lasting relationships with their customers.

Our team is the heart of Dsquares. We believe that exceptional people create exceptional solutions. Our culture is built on openness, empowerment, and a shared passion for delivering extraordinary customer experiences. Join us and be part of a team that's redefining loyalty programs.

More than rewards, we create experiences. And more than customers, we build advocates.

About The Internship Program:

This intensive 2-month program, starting in July, provides exceptional graduates with the skills and experience to thrive in our dynamic industry, The Internship program offers a unique opportunity to:

  • Gain hands-on experience through real-world projects and mentorship.
  • Develop your technical and professional skillset alongside a supportive cohort
  • Network with industry leaders and build a strong foundation for your career.
  • Top performers will have the chance to transition into a full-time position upon successful program completion

Stand out from the crowd and impress us with your talent. Don't miss this chance to accelerate your career

As a Backend Engineer, you will be an integral part of our dynamic and innovative team, working on cutting-edge technologies and projects.

Duties & Responsibilities:

  • Participate in the design, development, and testing of backend systems and APIs
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop and optimize software solutions
  • Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code
  • Troubleshoot and debug software defects and production issues
  • Collaborate with team members to identify areas of improvement and implement solutions

Requirements

Required Skills & Abilities:

  • Strong passion for technology and software development
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to quickly learn new languages, frameworks, and tools
  • Knowledge of data structures and algorithms
  • Excellent teamwork and collaboration skills
  • Good communication skills

Benefits

  • Financial Growth: Reap the rewards of your hard work with competitive compensation packages
  • Work-Life Balance: Achieve optimal well-being with our hybrid work environment, and regular team-building events
  • Continuous Development: Expand your horizons through our commitment to learning and development opportunities.
  • Perks and Privileges: Celebrate your journey with us through birthday offs, mobile allowances, transportation support, and a host of other employee-centric perks

companyAddress.streetAddress: Smart Village, Building A12, KM28 Cairo-Alex Dessert Road,

json.companyDescription:
Dsquares is a loyalty and rewards company that helps businesses increase customer loyalty and retention.

As the Global Loyalty Expert, the company equips businesses with an impressive array of tools that span the entire spectrum of strategic commercial planning, merchant management, and state-of-the-art AI and Data Analytics. 
This robust platform seamlessly integrates modern capabilities like ingenious pointing systems, electrifying e-vouchers, captivating gamification elements, and enlightening analytics tools. 

Operating across more than 10 countries in the Middle East and Africa, Dsquares partners with enterprises across diverse sectors, including banking, telecom, and retailers, revolutionizing the way businesses thrive in the competitive landscape.

json.title: Software Developement Engineer 1 (Backend)
json.descriptionHtml:
Who are we?

noon, the region's leading consumer commerce platform. On December 12th, 2017, noon launched its consumer platform in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, expanding to Egypt in February 2019. The noon ecosystem of services now includes marketplaces for food delivery, quick-commerce, fintech, and fashion. noon is a work in progress; we’re six years in, but only 5% done. noon’s mission: every door, every day.


About the CAKE Program:

The CAKE program is an initiative by noon designed to recruit and develop talented fresh graduates from the region, training them to become experts in the GCC's e-commerce industry.


  • 4-Week Intensive Training: This program equips new joiners with essential technical and domain knowledge, enabling them to become productive members of noon's engineering ecosystem.
  • Comprehensive Learning: New joiners will engage in comprehensive learning, including end-to-end training projects, technical tutorials, database and system design sessions, Information Security training, weekly Q&As, and discussions with members from various teams at noon.
  • Mentorship: New joiners receive guidance and support as they progress in their careers.


Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain high-quality, reusable, and scalable back-end applications on cloud platforms, collaborating with front-end and DevOps teams for seamless integration.
  • Design and implement robust data modeling solutions to meet diverse business needs.
  • Write clean, well-documented code accompanied by comprehensive test suites to ensure application stability and reliability.
  • Actively participate in brainstorming sessions with stakeholders, contributing innovative ideas for new solutions and enhancements to existing systems.


Must-Have Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
  • Enthusiasm for problem-solving, demonstrated through coursework, personal projects, or relevant experiences.
  • Strong foundation in algorithms and data structures, with an understanding of efficiency and optimization.
  • Good English communication and teamwork skills, with a willingness to seek help when needed.
  • Curiosity and the ability to learn quickly, showing eagerness to adapt to new technologies.
  • Proactive approach to tasks; while you’ll receive support, you should be comfortable taking initiative and driving projects forward.
  • Dedication to the projects you work on, ensuring follow-through and continuous improvement.


Good-to-Have Qualifications:

  • Familiarity with the full software development lifecycle.
  • Knowledge of Python, SQL, and API design


Timeline and Interviews:

  • Three hiring cohorts per year.
  • The hiring process includes:
  • One assessment
  • Two technical interviews
  • Two behavioral interviews


Who will excel?

noon isn’t for everyone. And that’s okay.’

This is one of our core operating principles.

We're looking for resourceful doers. Thinkers who are both creative and analytical. Problem solvers who are enthusiastic about delivering results. Our ideal candidate will be comfortable in a fast-paced, multi-tasked, high-energy and often ambiguous environment.

If the above values resonate with you, then noon might be the place for you.

companyAddress.streetAddress: Building B11 King Khalid International Airport

json.companyDescription:
noon is a digital ecosystem of products and services that are built in the region. Our vision is to become the engine of efficiency and convenience for the people we serve. We will elevate the quality of life by inspiring people with what we built and how we built it.

Find out more about joining our team here: https://joinnoon.com/#/

Starting in 2017, noon is now a digital ecosystem of products and services:

noon.com
The region’s leading e-commerce platform and digital marketplace, offering incredible value across multiple categories with world-class service, delivering to customers in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, and Egypt. 

noon Grocery
noon's grocery platform delivers everything you need, from fresh fruits and vegetables to kitchen and household items, and more, at the best prices in the UAE.

NowNow
On-demand platform giving customers access to stores and services in their local neighborhood, delivery within minutes of ordering. You want it now? Get it NowNow.

noon pay
Secure, speedy, and efficient online payment platform from noon. Send money to people, pay for purchases directly, and access incredible rewards using noon pay. 

SIVVI
The region’s fastest fashion destination, SIVVI offers customers a market-leading offering with delivery available across the UAE and Saudi Arabia. 

noon Food
noon food is a restaurant-first platform on the noon app, offering fair commissions, a sustainable program, and operating flexibility for the food and beverage industry in the Middle East.

Namshi
The Middle East's leading fashion & lifestyle e-commerce platform.

A homegrown tech platform, noon has rapidly built deep native capabilities in its marketplace, fulfillment, logistics, and payment platforms.

json.title: System Design engineer - AI & Tooling, LIGHT
json.descriptionHtml:
ResponsibilitiesAI-Driven Requirement Extraction

  • Manage and Do the requirement extraction service for the System and Product Architects Network utilizing the company AI tools. This role demands delivering high-accuracy results with rapid turnaround times to support architectural decision-making.

AI & Intelligent Automation

  • Leverage AI technologies (e.g., AI agents, NLP, automation assistants) to support:
  • Requirement extraction and analysis
  • Compliance and traceability support
  • Engineering data processing and reporting
  • Propose and implement AI-based solutions to improve productivity and reduce manual effort.
  • Collaborate with system engineers to ensure AI solutions align with engineering standards and quality requirements.

Tooling & Scripting Development

  • Design, develop, and maintain automation tools according to the defined roadmap.
  • Document high-level requirements and technical specifications for developed tools.
  • Develop scripts and applications to automate repetitive engineering activities (e.g., requirement handling, traceability, reports, metrics).
  • Ensure maintainability by documenting tool architecture, design decisions, and usage guidelines.

Toolchain & ALM Support

  • Define and support the required toolchain for System Engineering activities.
  • Work with Requirement Management and ALM tools (e.g., Codebeamer, DOORS, Core ALM).
  • Support integrations between tools and data sources when needed.

Key competenciesTechnical Skills

Programming & Scripting

  • Python
  • Javascript / Google Apps Script
  • Google Docs / Sheets functions & automation
  • HTTP rest API's

Tooling & ALM: ( Plus Knowledge)

  • Codebeamer (Requirement Management Tool)
  • Google Cloud Platform

Automation & Integration concepts

  • AI & Data Handling:
  • Basic to intermediate experience with AI tools, APIs, or AI agents
  • Interest in applying AI to engineering processes

Soft Skills

  • Strong communication and collaboration skills
  • Ability to work autonomously and proactively
  • Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving skills
  • User-oriented mindset (training, support, feedback handling)
  • Time Managment

Nice to Have

Experience with requirement traceability or compliance activities

Exposure to AI-assisted automation or low-code/no-code platforms

Understanding of system engineering lifecycle and deliverables

Aware About Automotive Industry And Embedded Systems.

Years of Experience0 to 2 years experience in tools development

json.companyDescription:
Valeo is a technology company and partner to all automakers and new mobility players worldwide. Valeo innovates to make mobility safer, smarter and more sustainable. Valeo enjoys technological and industrial leadership in electrification, driving assistance systems, reinvention of the interior experience and lighting everywhere. These four areas, vital to the transformation of mobility, are the Group's growth drivers.

Valeo in figures: 21.5 billion euros in sales in 2024 | 106,100 employees, 28 countries, 155 plants, 64 research and development centers and 19 distribution platforms at February 28, 2025. Valeo is listed on the Paris Stock Exchange

--

Valeo dispose d’un leadership technologique et industriel dans l’électrification, les aides à la conduite, la réinvention de la vie à bord et l'éclairage à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur du véhicule. Ces quatre domaines, essentiels à la transformation de la mobilité, sont les vecteurs de croissance du Groupe.

json.title: System Design Engineer - Model & simulation, LIGHT
json.descriptionHtml:
• Develop and qualify wiping/lighting functions using Model Based Systems Engineering approach
  • Define lighting functions according to customer needs and develop simulation models using MATLAB/Simulink/Stateflow
  • Define use cases and simulate the functions model according to them for up front verification.
  • Simulate the lighting function in the complete environment at vehicle level
  • Realize fast prototyping applications and Demo Cars for upfront verification
  • Support RFQ and establish compliance and choice matrix.
  • Contribute to innovative Model Based Systems Engineering projects
  • Redesign specification models in compliance with VLS standards.
  • Ensure technology transfer from P3 to P2&P1 projects in compliance with System and Software Metier constraints.
  • Inspires and encourages colleagues to apply intelligently customized best practices.
  • Contribute to Develop, qualify and maintain VWS/ VLS standard Library
  • Identify system functions diversity, dependencies and constraints in order to define reusable subsystems and blocks.
  • Define specific test cases to qualify libraries behavior and improve libraries robustness.
  • Support Model Based Design Implementation Engineer during standardization phase.
  • Ensure the full coverage of the specific test cases to qualify libraries behavior and improve libraries robustness.
  • Ensure the coverage level of the Implementation Model aligned with Model Development Methodology & Strategy
  • Code Generation and Ensure Quality of Deliverables
  • Support Code generation from Implementation Model using Embedded Coder.
  • Ensure the Compliance with Model Advisor Rules
  • Ensure Compliance of source code with Valeo Coding Rules and MISRA for auto generated Code
  • Contribute to build and deploy VWS/VLS Model Based Systems Engineering Design standards
  • Develop simulation methodologies and tools.
  • Perform model Peer reviews across VWS/VLS projects to ensure project consistency
  • Perform technical reviews on new functions.
  • Perform technical reviews on innovative functions before implementation during transition phase (P3 to P1 projects).
  • Education / Training

System/Electronics/Software/MBD/MBSE Engineer

Professional Experience

System experience for a minimum of 2~3 years in SW/System domain in Automotive industry: Model Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) or Model Based Design (MBD) approach.

Fast prototyping systems

Development in embedded systems

Methodology development knowledge (V cycle)

Knowledge of automotive communication bus (Ethernet, CAN, LIN), Diagnostic.

Languages

The English language is mandatory.

Other Specifications

Knowledge About The Following Tools Is a Must

  • MATLAB/Simulink/Stateflow

Knowledge About The Following Tools/Concepts Is a Plus

  • Control Law Theory
  • DOORS/CodeBeamer
  • dSPACE MicroAutoBox, CATIAMagic, SCANeR,
  • Automotive communication buses: Ethernet /CAN / LIN network and associated tools (CANoe, CANdela, …)
  • Ensure the coverage level of the tests: MIL on Implementation Model (Back to Back), SIL, PIL
  • Support SW Integrator for the Integration phase of the functions developed in Model

json.title: Graduate In Training Program (GIT),  Embedded Software
json.descriptionHtml:
Join us for six intense months in the R&D Team to gain the essential professional skills and global exposure needed to drive your success.

Key Responsibilities

As a Graduate Internship Trainee in the R&D Team, you will be actively involved in:

  • Develop and maintain software codes based on defined component requirements and component design.
  • Apply standard software guidelines including MISRA-C rules and Valeo naming rules.
  • Configure the different software components according to the specified requirements.
  • Deliver and integrate the software component in overall software according to defined high level design.
  • Develop component test plans and test cases to verify the correct functionality against the requirements.
  • Verify the software component functionalities in a defined HW target/platform.
  • Verify the software component performance indicators.
  • Execute static analysis tools and analyze the results.
  • Follow defined project processes and ensure process conformance.
  • Report work progress continuously through attendance of daily & weekly project internal meetings.
  • Contribute effectively in the continuous improvement of his/her project, team, and work environment by
  • submitting improvement proposals whenever possible.
  • Raise flags pro-actively for any issue that can impact his/her project or team.
  • Test cases planning & Execution of test plans.
  • Analyze executed test plans, and confirm that the software behavior respects the requirement documents
  • Report findings (SW Bugs) on the configuration management tool

Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Recent graduate of year 2025 and 2024
  • Educational Background: Bachelor's degree in Communication, Mechatronics, Electronics ,Computer Engineering or Computer Science.
  • Language Proficiency: Excellent command of both English and Arabic (written and verbal communication is essential). French is a strong plus.
  • Ability to work effectively in a team environment.

Program Details

Status: Full time.

Location: On-site.

Employment Details The successful candidate will be hired as a contractor and will be part of the Power Team at Valeo

Valeo dispose d’un leadership technologique et industriel dans l’électrification, les aides à la conduite, la réinvention de la vie à bord et l'éclairage à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur du véhicule. Ces quatre domaines, essentiels à la transformation de la mobilité, sont les vecteurs de croissance du Groupe.

Valeo en chiffres: 21.5 milliards d'euros de chiffre d'affaires en 2024 | 106 100 employés, 28 pays, 155 sites de production, 64 centres de recherche et développement et 19 plateformes de distribution au 28 février 2025. Valeo est cotée à la Bourse de Paris.

json.title: Data Automation Engineer
json.descriptionHtml:
Position

Data Automation Engineer

Job Description

As a Data Automation Engineer, you will play a crucial role in developing and maintaining automated data processing systems. You will work closely with data analysts, and other stakeholders to design, implement, and optimize data pipelines, ensuring the efficient and accurate flow of data throughout the organization.

What You'll Do

  • Develop and implement automated data pipelines for ingesting, processing, and storing structured and unstructured data.
  • Integrate data from various sources in both real-time and batch mechanisms and perform transformations to ensure consistency, accuracy, and reliability.
  • Implement data quality checks and monitoring mechanisms to identify and address issues proactively.
  • Write code and scripts for automation of data processes using languages such as Python, Java, or Scala.
  • Leverage ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) tools and frameworks [Apache spark, AWS Glue] for efficient data processing.
  • Collaborate with other intelligent data teams.
  • Ensure seamless data flow for machine learning and analytics applications.
  • Implement monitoring systems to track data pipeline performance and identify areas for optimization.
  • Continuously optimize data processes for efficiency and scalability.
  • Document data processes, system architecture, and codebase for knowledge sharing and future reference.
  • Keep documentation up-to-date with any changes or enhancements to the data infrastructure.
  • Implement and adhere to data security and compliance standards.
  • Collaborate with security teams to ensure data protection and privacy.

You're a Perfect Fit If You Have

  • 1+ years of experience in data engineering, automation, or a related field.
  • Strong understanding of data pipelines and data lifecycle management.
  • Proficiency in scripting languages like Python, Shell, or similar.
  • Experience with data automation tools (Airflow, Luigi, etc.) a plus.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively across teams.
  • Knowledge with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) for data processing.

Knowledge of data warehousing and data quality methodologies

Location:

EG-Banha, Egypt (EI Corniche Street)

Time Type

Full time

Job Category

Information Technology

json.title: Jr Budget & Controlling Specialist
json.descriptionHtml:
Job Purpose

The Jr Budget & Controlling Specialist plays a supporting role within the Finance team, focusing specifically on budgeting, forecasting, and financial control for (RDMC) projects. The primary objective is to maintain financial discipline and provide accurate, timely data analysis to ensure project spending aligns with strategic goals and approved budgets. This role is crucial for transforming financial data into practical insights that guide sound business decisions.

Responsibilities/Duties

Profil de candidat recherché :

Financial Control & Budget Compliance

  • Assist in the Budget Approval Control cycle by thoroughly reviewing and validating all purchase requests and purchase orders against approved departmental and project budgets.
  • Monitor all expenditures to guarantee adherence to RATP policies and budgetary guidelines.

Performance Reporting & Performance Analysis

  • Prepare accurate monthly and quarterly financial performance reports and dashboards, primarily comparing Actual results versus Budget/Forecast.
  • Analyze key variances and financial trends, clearly documenting the root causes and potential financial impacts and share them with the Budget team.

Budgeting and Forecasting Support

  • Assist the budget team in the annual budget preparation and rolling financial forecasting processes
  • Collect and validate financial and operational data from various systems to ensure accuracy and reliability for all planning and reporting activities.

Process Improvement & Ad-Hoc Support

  • Identify and propose improvements for existing procedures related to budget control, data collection, and reporting to enhance efficiency and data quality.
  • Fulfill any other duties and analytical requests to support the departmental objectives.

Qualifications

ESSENTIAL QUALIFICATIONS, KNOWLEDGE & EXPERIENCE

  • Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a closely related quantitative field.
  • Very good command in Arabic & English.

Knowledge

  • Familiarity with cost control and budgeting.
  • Foundational understanding of finance principles.
  • Practical experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI or Tableau) or ERP systems is a plus.
  • Good proficiency in Microsoft Excel (e.g., VLOOKUPs, pivot tables, formulas).

Experience

  • 0-3 years of professional experience as an Analyst, Accountant, or a similar role.

Desired Behaviors & Experiences

  • Demonstrated growth mindset, solution orientation, and effective collaboration skills.
  • Demonstrated skills in detail orientation and quantitative analysis.
  • A team player who can work well with others.
  • High degree of professionalism, ethical conduct, and integrity.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced industry.

json.title: Developer with Disability (m/w/d)
json.descriptionHtml:
Standort

Cairo, EG

Stellen-ID: 5315

Join the energy revolution with #teamsonnen!

At sonnen, we’re driven by a clear goal: creating a future powered by clean, affordable energy for everyone. That’s why we make our customers independent – not only from fossil fuels, but also from rising electricity costs.

The key to this independence is our intelligent, all-in-one energy system. It combines solar panels, battery storage, energy tariffs, and wallboxes – all developed and manufactured in Germany.

As the first and only provider in Germany, we also connect thousands of home batteries into one shared network: the sonnenVPP, our industry-leading virtual power plant.

In short: every day, we’re working to shape the energy future. And we’d be thrilled to have you join us!

We are actively seeking engineers with disabilities who are passionate about technology, problem-solving, and building systems that matter.

As a Hardware or Software Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, developing, and optimizing products and systems that enable the future of clean energy and digital innovation. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams and contribute to solutions used across global markets.

We will align your exact responsibilities based on your skills, interests, and accessibility needs.

What You Will Do To Drive The Energy Transition

Software Engineering

  • Design, develop, and maintain software applications or embedded systems
  • Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code
  • Collaborate with engineers on architecture, code reviews, and testing
  • Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize performance
  • Contribute to continuous integration & deployment pipelines

Hardware Engineering

  • Support design, testing, and validation of electronic hardware components
  • Develop schematics, PCB layouts, or embedded hardware interfaces
  • Conduct functional testing and verification of prototypes
  • Document hardware specifications and collaborate with cross-functional teams
  • Assist in improving reliability, performance, and manufacturability

What You Will Need On That Journey

You do not need to meet all requirements — candidates with strong potential are encouraged to apply.

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field
  • Some experience in hardware or software development (academic, self-taught, professional — all welcome)
  • Basic knowledge in at least one of the following:
    • Software: Python, C/C++, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, or similar
    • Hardware: PCB design, embedded systems, electronics testing, microcontrollers
  • Strong problem-solving mindset and willingness to learn
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment
Stellensegment: Testing, Embedded, Developer, Computer Science, Java, Technology

json.companyDescription:
At sonnen, we are building the energy system of the future. An energy system in which electricity is clean and people are the focus. To this end, we are developing new technologies and business models that have not existed before. Whether intelligent power storage, virtual power plants or digital services - we set the trends of a new energy world. This creates space for innovation, creativity, passion and personal development opportunities in a rapidly growing company.

Our drive is our vision of clean and affordable energy for everyone. Because we want our planet to remain livable for the next generation. 

sonnen is expanding its diverse and international team. Our goal is to grow our hardware, software, and digital capabilities to meet the increasing global demand for our products. As part of this expansion, we decided to establish an R&D hub in Cairo, a bustling and tech-savvy metropolis. We are confident that by entering the Egyptian market, Cairo will fuel our innovation with highly skilled and diverse talent, and its vibrant energy. 

If you want to change and redesign the energy system together with us, we look forward to receiving your application through our career site: https://sonnen.eg/careers/

json.title: Social Media Analyst and Researcher
json.descriptionHtml:
Role Description


We are looking for a Social Media Analyst to join our marketing team. The ideal candidate is data-driven, observant, and experienced in analyzing the success of social media campaigns. This role involves creating reports and analyzing metrics

The ideal candidate should be knowledgeable about social media platforms, analytics, and trends.

This is a full-time on-site role located in El Maadi for a Social Media Analyst and Researcher.


Responsibilities:


  • Analyse data from social media platforms using tools such as Google Analytics, Hootsuite, and Sprout Social.
  • Create reports and dashboards to track progress and inform stakeholders of insights.
  • Collaborate with marketing and content teams to develop a social media strategy.
  • Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in social media.
  • Study competitors and find ways to improve.
  • Monitor social media platforms, trends, and industry best practices to identify opportunities for improvement and innovation.


Qualifications:


  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field
  • 2+ years of experience working as a Social Media Analyst and Researcher
  • Ability to use various data software and digital marketing tools
  • Excellent analytical, research, and multitasking skills
  • Strong understanding of social media platforms and emerging digital trends
  • Ability to work in teams and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and Arabic
  • Experience with Arabic Content creation is a plus
  • Experience with content scheduling and planning is a plus
  • Experience with data visualization tools is a plus


Why Join Us?


• Work in a creative and dynamic environment where your ideas shape the digital landscape.

• Be part of a team dedicated to innovation, working with top-tier clients on exciting projects.

json.title: Graduate In Training Program (GIT), Agentic AI Systems
json.descriptionHtml:
Valeo est une entreprise mondiale de haute technologie qui conçoit des solutions révolutionnaires pour réinventer la mobilité. Nous sommes un équipementier partenaire des constructeurs automobiles et des acteurs de la nouvelle mobilité dans le monde entier. Notre vision ? Inventer une mobilité plus verte et plus sûre, grâce à des solutions axées sur la conduite intuitive et la réduction des émissions de CO2. Nous sommes leaders dans nos domaines d'activité et reconnus comme l'une des plus grandes entreprises innovantes au monde.

Key Responsibilities

As a Graduate Internship Trainee in the VITE R&I Team, you will be actively involved in~

  • Design and Architect Agentic Workflows~ Move beyond simple prompting to implement complex reasoning patterns such as ReAct (Reason + Act), Plan-and-Solve, and Self-Reflection loops.
  • Multi-Agent Orchestration~ Develop and manage systems where multiple specialized agents collaborate (e.g., a "Dispatcher" agent coordinating with "Diagnostic" and "Navigation" agents) to solve complex user requests.
  • Tool & API Integration~ Build and integrate custom "tools" that allow agents to interact with external environments, including automotive APIs, real-time databases, and web services.
  • Full-Stack POC Development~ Develop lightweight, responsive web-based interfaces (e.g., Streamlit, FastAPI, or React) to serve as the front-end for agentic operational demonstrators.
  • Agentic Evaluation & Guardrails~ Implement testing frameworks to evaluate agent trajectory, tool-calling accuracy, and "loop-breaking" to ensure reliable performance in non-deterministic environments.
  • System Prompt Engineering~ Optimize complex system instructions and few-shot examples to steer agent behavior, memory management, and persona consistency.

Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Academic Status~ Must be a 2024- 2025 Graduate.
  • Educational Background~ Bachelor's degree in Mechatronics, Computer Engineering, Computer Science or a closely related field.
  • Language Proficiency~ Excellent command of both English and Arabic (written and verbal communication is essential). French is a strong plus.
  • Agentic Frameworks~ Proficiency in orchestration libraries such as LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen.
  • Backend & API Development~ Strong Python skills with experience in FastAPI or Flask to create the "connective tissue" between the AI agent and the user interface.
  • Prompt Engineering & Tool Calling~ Deep understanding of structured output (JSON mode), function calling, and techniques for grounding agents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
  • Frontend Basics~ Ability to build functional UI/UX for demonstrators using modern web tools (e.g., Streamlit, Tailwind CSS, or basic React).
  • Systems Thinking~ The ability to map complex operational tasks into discrete agentic steps and handle edge cases where autonomous loops might fail.
  • Modern AI Stack~ Familiarity with vector databases and observability tools for tracking agent traces.

Program Details

Status~ Full time.

Location~ On-site.

Position~

AI4all

Département~

Software Development

Schedule~

Temps plein

Employee Status~

Alternant (Fixed Term)

Type de contrat~

Job Posting Date~

2026-05-12

Join Us !

Being part of our team, you will join~

  • one of the largest global innovative companies, with more than 20,000 engineers working in Research & Development
  • a multi-cultural environment that values diversity and international collaboration
  • more than 100,000 colleagues in 31 countries... which make a lot of opportunity for career growth
  • a business highly committed to limiting the environmental impact if its activities and ranked by Corporate Knights as the number one company in the automotive sector in terms of sustainable development

More information on Valeo~ https~//www.valeo.com

json.title: Quality Control Analyst ( Contingent worker / Temp-to-Hire )
json.descriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Performs wet and instrumental analysis (HPLC, UV, GC, FTIR) of raw materials, in-process and finished products.
  • Performs physical testing and chemical analysis of Pharmaceutical Packaging Material.
  • Troubleshoots and resolves operations issues.
  • Prepares and standardizes volumetric solutions, reagents and indicators Internal calibration of instruments according to work instructions.
  • Validation of the assay methods of finished products.
  • Participates in validation of facilities and manufacturing processes
  • Job Location: October City
  • Employment Type: Contingent worker / Temp-to-Hire


Qualifications:

We are looking for candidates whose experience and skills align closely with the qualifications outlined below:

  • Bachelor’s degree in pharmacy or science with grade Very good.
  • Fresh Graduate
  • Fluency in English, both written and verbal
  • Excellent computer skills and data analysis knowledge.
  • Good documentation practice and technical writing

json.title: Graduate In Training Program (GIT), AI Development (Linux)
json.descriptionHtml:
Valeo est une entreprise mondiale de haute technologie qui conçoit des solutions révolutionnaires pour réinventer la mobilité. Nous sommes un équipementier partenaire des constructeurs automobiles et des acteurs de la nouvelle mobilité dans le monde entier. Notre vision ? Inventer une mobilité plus verte et plus sûre, grâce à des solutions axées sur la conduite intuitive et la réduction des émissions de CO2. Nous sommes leaders dans nos domaines d'activité et reconnus comme l'une des plus grandes entreprises innovantes au monde.

Key Responsibilities

As a Graduate Internship Trainee in the VITE R&I Team, you will be actively involved in~

  • Design and prototype machine learning models tailored for automotive features.
  • Adapt and fine-tune pre-trained large language models (LLMs like GPT, LLaMA) for specific automotive domains.
  • Develop end-to-end pipelines that combine Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), LLM inference, and Text-to-Speech (TTS).
  • Benchmark various model architectures and optimize parameters for performance.
  • Collaborate on implementing models into proof-of-concept/research projects and integrating prototypes into applications.
  • Write, test, and optimize high-performance C++ code for Linux-based systems.
  • Contribute to the development of system-level or performance-critical C++ applications.
  • Build, configure, and manage projects using CMake or Makefiles, including the integration of third-party libraries.
  • Profile, troubleshoot, and optimize applications, focusing on efficient memory usage.
  • Thoroughly test deployed features to ensure both quality and reliable performance.
  • Document all experiments, findings, and the development process comprehensively.
  • Work with middleware teams to define, implement, and integrate services over the automotive Ethernet stack.

Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Academic Status~ Must be a 2024- 2025 Graduate.
  • Educational Background~ Bachelor's degree in Mechatronics, Computer Engineering, Computer Science or a closely related field.
  • Language Proficiency~ Excellent command of both English and Arabic (written and verbal communication is essential). French is a strong plus.
  • Solid understanding of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms.
  • Strong proficiency in Python, coupled with experience in at least one major ML framework (TensorFlow or PyTorch).
  • Experience with ASR toolkits (e.g., OpenAI Whisper, Vosk, Kaldi) and TTS frameworks.
  • Basic knowledge of model evaluation metrics and training optimization techniques.
  • Ability to understand and apply concepts from recent academic papers or tutorials.
  • Proficiency with Linux command-line environments (bash, ssh, editors).
  • Experience with C++ fundamentals~ understanding of pointers, memory management, and multithreading concepts.
  • Familiarity with version control (Git) and build systems (CMake, Make).
  • Understanding or coursework in automotive communication protocols like SOME/IP, MQTT, and protobuf.
  • Strong analytical mindset and the ability to translate abstract user requirements into clear technical specifications.
  • Comfortable working in an agile, office-based prototyping environment, capable of rapid feature iteration.
  • Preferred (Plus)~ Experience with network packet capture and analysis tools (e.g., tcpdump, Wireshark).
  • Preferred (Plus)~ Experience with RTMaps.

Program Details

Status~ Full time.

Location~ On-site.

Position~

AI4all

Département~

Software Development

Schedule~

Temps plein

Employee Status~

Alternant (Fixed Term)

Type de contrat~

Job Posting Date~

2026-05-12

Join Us !

Being part of our team, you will join~

  • one of the largest global innovative companies, with more than 20,000 engineers working in Research & Development
  • a multi-cultural environment that values diversity and international collaboration
  • more than 100,000 colleagues in 31 countries... which make a lot of opportunity for career growth
  • a business highly committed to limiting the environmental impact if its activities and ranked by Corporate Knights as the number one company in the automotive sector in terms of sustainable development

More information on Valeo~ https~//www.valeo.com

json.companyDescription:
Valeo is a technology company and partner to all automakers and new mobility players worldwide. Valeo innovates to make mobility safer, smarter and more sustainable. Valeo enjoys technological and industrial leadership in electrification, driving assistance systems, reinvention of the interior experience and lighting everywhere. These four areas, vital to the transformation of mobility, are the Group's growth drivers.

Valeo in figures: 21.5 billion euros in sales in 2024 | 106,100 employees, 28 countries, 155 plants, 64 research and development centers and 19 distribution platforms at February 28, 2025. Valeo is listed on the Paris Stock Exchange

--

Valeo, entreprise technologique, partenaire de tous les constructeurs automobiles et des nouveaux acteurs de la mobilité, œuvre pour une mobilité plus propre, plus sûre et plus intelligente, grâce à ses innovations. Valeo dispose d’un leadership technologique et industriel dans l’électrification, les aides à la conduite, la réinvention de la vie à bord et l'éclairage à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur du véhicule. Ces quatre domaines, essentiels à la transformation de la mobilité, sont les vecteurs de croissance du Groupe.

Valeo en chiffres: 21.5 milliards d'euros de chiffre d'affaires en 2024 | 106 100 employés, 28 pays, 155 sites de production, 64 centres de recherche et développement et 19 plateformes de distribution au 28 février 2025. Valeo est cotée à la Bourse de Paris.

json.title: Graduate In Training Program (GIT), Agentic AI Systems
json.descriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities

As a Graduate Internship Trainee in the VITE R&I Team, you will be actively involved in:

  • Design and Architect Agentic Workflows: Move beyond simple prompting to implement complex reasoning patterns such as ReAct (Reason + Act), Plan-and-Solve, and Self-Reflection loops.
  • Multi-Agent Orchestration: Develop and manage systems where multiple specialized agents collaborate (e.g., a "Dispatcher" agent coordinating with "Diagnostic" and "Navigation" agents) to solve complex user requests.
  • Tool & API Integration: Build and integrate custom "tools" that allow agents to interact with external environments, including automotive APIs, real-time databases, and web services.
  • Full-Stack POC Development: Develop lightweight, responsive web-based interfaces (e.g., Streamlit, FastAPI, or React) to serve as the front-end for agentic operational demonstrators.
  • Agentic Evaluation & Guardrails: Implement testing frameworks to evaluate agent trajectory, tool-calling accuracy, and "loop-breaking" to ensure reliable performance in non-deterministic environments.
  • System Prompt Engineering: Optimize complex system instructions and few-shot examples to steer agent behavior, memory management, and persona consistency.

Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Academic Status: Must be a 2024- 2025 Graduate.
  • Educational Background: Bachelor's degree in Mechatronics, Computer Engineering, Computer Science or a closely related field.
  • Language Proficiency: Excellent command of both English and Arabic (written and verbal communication is essential). French is a strong plus.
  • Agentic Frameworks: Proficiency in orchestration libraries such as LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen.
  • Backend & API Development: Strong Python skills with experience in FastAPI or Flask to create the "connective tissue" between the AI agent and the user interface.
  • Prompt Engineering & Tool Calling: Deep understanding of structured output (JSON mode), function calling, and techniques for grounding agents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
  • Frontend Basics: Ability to build functional UI/UX for demonstrators using modern web tools (e.g., Streamlit, Tailwind CSS, or basic React).
  • Systems Thinking: The ability to map complex operational tasks into discrete agentic steps and handle edge cases where autonomous loops might fail.
  • Modern AI Stack: Familiarity with vector databases and observability tools for tracking agent traces.

Program Details

Status: Full time.

Location: On-site.

Disclaimer: The successful candidate will be hired as a contractor and will be part of the VITE R&I Team at Valeo

json.title: Quality Analyst
json.descriptionHtml:
Job Description

 About TaskUs: TaskUs is a provider of outsourced digital services and next-generation customer experience to fast-growing technology companies, helping its clients represent, protect and grow their brands. Leveraging a cloud-based infrastructure, TaskUs serves clients in the fastest-growing sectors, including social media, e-commerce, gaming, streaming media, food delivery, ride-sharing, HiTech, FinTech, and HealthTech.

The People First culture at TaskUs has enabled the company to expand its workforce to approximately 45,000 employees globally. Presently, we have a presence in twenty-three locations across twelve countries, which include the Philippines, India, and the United States.

It started with one ridiculously good idea to create a different breed of Business Processing Outsourcing (BPO)! We at TaskUs understand that achieving growth for our partners requires a culture of constant motion, exploring new technologies, being ready to handle any challenge at a moment's notice, and mastering consistency in an ever-changing world.

What We Offer: At TaskUs, we prioritize our employees' well-being by offering competitive industry salaries and comprehensive benefits packages. Our commitment to a People First culture is reflected in the various departments we have established, including Total Rewards, Wellness, HR, and Diversity. We take pride in our inclusive environment and positive impact on the community. Moreover, we actively encourage internal mobility and professional growth at all stages of an employee's career within TaskUs. Join our team today and experience firsthand our dedication to supporting People First.

It started with one ridiculously good idea - Create a different breed of BPO! We at TaskUs

understand that achieving growth for our partners requires a culture of constant motion; exploring

new technologies, being ready to handle any challenge in a moment's notice, mastering consistency

in an ever-changing world - that's what it takes to get there. If that's something you want to be a

part of, apply today for the Quality Analyst role to support Us in Egypt!

What does a Quality Analyst really do?

The Quality Analyst is responsible for completing audits or evaluations, which may include but not

be limited to, Quality Audits, scrubbing performed CSAT/NPS, Resolution rate, AHT, Cycle Time,

Policy Adherence, Ticket Closures, etc. Quality Analyst will ensure that they perform the evaluations

as per the targets defined for them on a monthly or weekly basis.

Roles And Responsibilities

  • Audit calls/interactions/transactions for aligned Teammates
  • Coach Teammates for performance improvement (campaign specific)
  • Report performance for aligned span on a daily/weekly/monthly basis
  • Provide inputs, basis audits, for briefings and training need identification
  • Partner with TLs in leading Team Meetings for metric improvement
  • Participate in strategic projects for the campaign/LoB
  • Identify and escalate any potential quality issues per defined process
  • Isolate and report defects; verify defect fixes
  • Suggest process/system improvements based on common customer concerns
  • Accomplish other responsibilities assigned by management
  • Drive quality initiatives, contests and campaigns for the assigned span
  • Be updated on knowledge and serve as SME for the campaign/LoB

Technical Skills & Qualifications

  • Graduation (Preferred)
  • Minimum of 1-year experience as Quality Analyst (preferred)
  • Basic excel/google sheets skills
  • Problem-solving skills
  • Preferably familiar with application of basic quality tools such as cause and effect, histogram,

correlation etc.

  • Fluency in English

Soft Skills

  • Strong customer centricity
  • Ability to provide constructive feedback in an assertive manner
  • Good written and verbal communication skills
  • Logical thinking
  • Ability to manage conflicts
  • Attention to detail
  • Ability to work with minimal supervision and demonstrate initiative and good judgment
  • Versatility and ability to work on multiple projects
  • Ability to establish and maintain effective working relations with a wide variety of individuals
  • Ability to work with a diverse team
  • Continuous improvement mindset

Personality Traits Required

  • Clear thought process
  • Ability to clearly articulate
  • Highly conscientious and diligent
  • Assertiveness

How We Partner To Protect You: TaskUs will neither solicit money from you during your application process nor require any form of payment in order to proceed with your application. Kindly ensure that you are always in communication with only authorized recruiters of TaskUs.

DEI: In TaskUs we believe that innovation and higher performance are brought by people from all walks of life. We welcome applicants of different backgrounds, demographics, and circumstances. Inclusive and equitable practices are our responsibility as a business. TaskUs is committed to providing equal access to opportunities. If you need reasonable accommodations in any part of the hiring process, please let us know.

We invite you to explore all TaskUs career opportunities and apply through the provided URL https://www.taskus.com/careers/ .

TaskUs is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We celebrate and support diversity; we are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. TaskUs people first culture thrives on it for the benefit of our employees, our clients, our services, and our community.

Req Id: R_2503_4477

Posted At: Thu Mar 27 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)

json.title: Junior Business Analyst
json.descriptionHtml:
🌿 Junior Business Analyst

📍 On-Site | 6th of October, Giza Governorate

Company: AROMATIC Herbs & Spices


About Us


AROMATIC is a leading manufacturer specializing in herbs, spices, seeds & flowers.

We pride ourselves on innovation, quality, and a commitment to excellence. Our core values are agility, transparency, and worth. As we continue to grow and expand our operations, we are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Junior Business Analyst to join our team and support data-driven decision-making across the organization.


What You'll Do


  • Collect, analyze, and interpret business data to support strategic and operational decisions.
  • Prepare reports, dashboards, and performance analyses for management.
  • Monitor key business KPIs and identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement.
  • Support budgeting, forecasting, and business planning activities.
  • Conduct market, competitor, and industry research to support growth initiatives.
  • Collaborate with departments including Sales, Export, Supply Chain, Production, Finance, and HR to gather and analyze business requirements.
  • Assist in process improvement and business transformation projects.
  • Support ERP and reporting system development by identifying business needs and recommending solutions.
  • Present findings and recommendations in a clear and actionable manner.


Who You Are


  • Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Industrial Engineering, Statistics, or a related field.
  • 0–2 years of experience in Business Analysis, Data Analysis, Finance, Operations, or a similar analytical role.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
  • Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or other reporting tools is a plus.
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to work with large datasets.
  • Good communication and presentation skills.
  • Excellent command of English.


Why Join Us?


At AROMATIC, you'll gain exposure to multiple business functions and contribute to projects that directly impact company performance and growth. This role offers excellent learning opportunities, professional development, and a clear path for career advancement.


✅ Work closely with senior leadership and cross-functional teams.

✅ Develop analytical, commercial, and strategic business skills.

✅ Be part of a growing company with ambitious expansion plans.

✅ Enjoy a professional and supportive work environment.

json.descriptionText:
🌿 Junior Business Analyst
📍 On-Site | 6th of October, Giza Governorate
 Company: AROMATIC Herbs & Spices

About Us


AROMATIC is a leading manufacturer specializing in herbs, spices, seeds & flowers.
We pride ourselves on innovation, quality, and a commitment to excellence. Our core values are agility, transparency, and worth. As we continue to grow and expand our operations, we are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical Junior Business Analyst to join our team and support data-driven decision-making across the organization.

What You'll Do



- Collect, analyze, and interpret business data to support strategic and operational decisions.
- Prepare reports, dashboards, and performance analyses for management.
- Monitor key business KPIs and identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement.
- Support budgeting, forecasting, and business planning activities.
- Conduct market, competitor, and industry research to support growth initiatives.
- Collaborate with departments including Sales, Export, Supply Chain, Production, Finance, and HR to gather and analyze business requirements.
- Assist in process improvement and business transformation projects.
- Support ERP and reporting system development by identifying business needs and recommending solutions.
- Present findings and recommendations in a clear and actionable manner.

Who You Are



- Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Industrial Engineering, Statistics, or a related field.
- 0–2 years of experience in Business Analysis, Data Analysis, Finance, Operations, or a similar analytical role.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
- Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or other reporting tools is a plus.
- Strong attention to detail and ability to work with large datasets.
- Good communication and presentation skills.
- Excellent command of English.

Why Join Us?


At AROMATIC, you'll gain exposure to multiple business functions and contribute to projects that directly impact company performance and growth. This role offers excellent learning opportunities, professional development, and a clear path for career advancement.


✅ Work closely with senior leadership and cross-functional teams.
 ✅ Develop analytical, commercial, and strategic business skills.
 ✅ Be part of a growing company with ambitious expansion plans.
 ✅ Enjoy a professional and supportive work environment.

json.title: Graduate In Training Program (GIT), AI Development (Linux)
json.descriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities

As a Graduate Internship Trainee in the VITE R&I Team, you will be actively involved in:

  • Design and prototype machine learning models tailored for automotive features.
  • Adapt and fine-tune pre-trained large language models (LLMs like GPT, LLaMA) for specific automotive domains.
  • Develop end-to-end pipelines that combine Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), LLM inference, and Text-to-Speech (TTS).
  • Benchmark various model architectures and optimize parameters for performance.
  • Collaborate on implementing models into proof-of-concept/research projects and integrating prototypes into applications.
  • Write, test, and optimize high-performance C++ code for Linux-based systems.
  • Contribute to the development of system-level or performance-critical C++ applications.
  • Build, configure, and manage projects using CMake or Makefiles, including the integration of third-party libraries.
  • Profile, troubleshoot, and optimize applications, focusing on efficient memory usage.
  • Thoroughly test deployed features to ensure both quality and reliable performance.
  • Document all experiments, findings, and the development process comprehensively.
  • Work with middleware teams to define, implement, and integrate services over the automotive Ethernet stack.

Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Academic Status: Must be a 2024- 2025 Graduate.
  • Educational Background: Bachelor's degree in Mechatronics, Computer Engineering, Computer Science or a closely related field.
  • Language Proficiency: Excellent command of both English and Arabic (written and verbal communication is essential). French is a strong plus.
  • Solid understanding of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms.
  • Strong proficiency in Python, coupled with experience in at least one major ML framework (TensorFlow or PyTorch).
  • Experience with ASR toolkits (e.g., OpenAI Whisper, Vosk, Kaldi) and TTS frameworks.
  • Basic knowledge of model evaluation metrics and training optimization techniques.
  • Ability to understand and apply concepts from recent academic papers or tutorials.
  • Proficiency with Linux command-line environments (bash, ssh, editors).
  • Experience with C++ fundamentals: understanding of pointers, memory management, and multithreading concepts.
  • Familiarity with version control (Git) and build systems (CMake, Make).
  • Understanding or coursework in automotive communication protocols like SOME/IP, MQTT, and protobuf.
  • Strong analytical mindset and the ability to translate abstract user requirements into clear technical specifications.
  • Comfortable working in an agile, office-based prototyping environment, capable of rapid feature iteration.
  • Preferred (Plus): Experience with network packet capture and analysis tools (e.g., tcpdump, Wireshark).
  • Preferred (Plus): Experience with RTMaps.

Program Details

Status: Full time.

Location: On-site.

Disclaimer: The successful candidate will be hired as a contractor and will be part of the VITE R&I Team at Valeo
